rationale.P01: Real AI platform outage: OnCall AI Workflow Errors at 0.52 workflow_500_rate vs 0.05, never auto-resolved, pat-ai-workflow-500 surging negative right after the ai-agent-svc-2026.06.21-b deploy (predefined-agent lookup / probe regression). This is a genuine ai-agent-svc outage. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P18: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-ai-workflow-500 root): AI Assistant Overall Error Monitor firing on the same outage. Collapse into the ai-agent-svc incident.
rationale.P19: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-ai-workflow-500 root): workflow-engine 500s on the shared failure path. Collapse into the AI outage incident.
rationale.P02: LLM 24 Hour Token Usage Warn (78% vs 75%): a cost/usage warning, not an outage. Capacity/billing signal — track for budget, do not page on-call.
rationale.P03: LLM 24 Hour Token Usage Warn (82% vs 75%): a cost/usage warning, not an outage. Capacity/billing signal — track for budget, do not page on-call.
rationale.P04: LLM 24 Hour Token Usage Warn (85% vs 75%): a cost/usage warning, not an outage. Capacity/billing signal — track for budget, do not page on-call.
rationale.P05: Spending Cap budget alert (91% of cap on ai-memory-svc): cost-governance noise, no service degradation. Suppress (finance/budget follow-up, not a page).

rationale.P08: LLM 24 Hour Token Usage Warn (76% vs 75%): a cost/usage warning, not an outage. Capacity/billing signal — track for budget, do not page on-call.
rationale.P09: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 17 fires/hr, self-clears in 18s. Noise.
rationale.P10: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 19 fires/hr, self-clears in 21s. Noise.
rationale.P11: Transient CPU blip on ai-memory-svc, auto-resolved in 44s. Self-healed. Noise.
rationale.P12: Transient CPU blip on inference-runner, auto-resolved in 37s. Self-healed. Noise.
rationale.P13: Spending Cap budget alert (90.5% of cap on ai-memory-svc): cost-governance noise, no service degradation. Suppress (finance/budget follow-up, not a page).
rationale.P14: Transient Workflow WARN spike, recovered in 39s. Noise.
rationale.P15: LLM 24 Hour Token Usage Warn (75.5% vs 75%): a cost/usage warning, not an outage. Capacity/billing signal — track for budget, do not page on-call.
rationale.P16: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 16 fires/hr, self-clears in 20s. Noise.
rationale.P17: Transient CPU blip on ai-agent-svc, auto-resolved in 41s. Self-healed. Noise.

notes: Real AI outage = P01 (OnCall AI Workflow Errors, culprit deploy ai-agent-svc-2026.06.21-b); P18/P19 are downstream AI-error symptoms. LLM token-usage + Spending Cap alerts are cost noise, not pages.
